theme_and_archetype.description: High visibility 'Tactical Minimalism' optimized for a modern CCTV monitoring app. Deep obsidian background with electric blaze red (for LIVE alerts) and crisp white/zinc contrast. Mobile-first, tactile, technical feel.

layout_and_spacing.app_container: w-full max-w-md min-h-screen bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col relative border-x border-zinc-900 shadow-2xl

camera_toggle.description: Tactile pill-shaped toggle at the top of the dashboard. Uses Framer Motion for the active background sliding.
camera_toggle.container_classes: bg-zinc-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-zinc-800/80 p-1.5 rounded-full flex gap-1 mx-6 mt-6 shadow-sm
camera_toggle.active_btn_classes: relative z-10 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-white flex-1 transition-all rounded-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2
camera_toggle.inactive_btn_classes: relative z-10 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-zinc-500 flex-1 hover:text-zinc-300 transition-all text-center flex items-center justify-center gap-2

video_stream_container.description: Main CCTV feed placeholder. Needs to look like a high-tech camera viewfinder.
video_stream_container.container_classes: relative aspect-[4/3] w-[calc(100%-3rem)] mx-6 mt-6 bg-black rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden border border-zinc-800 shadow-[0_10px_40px_-10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
video_stream_container.image_classes: w-full h-full object-cover opacity-80 filter contrast-125 saturate-50
video_stream_container.live_overlay: absolute top-4 left-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-red-500/30 text-red-500 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-mono font-bold flex items-center gap-2 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(239,68,68,0.2)]
video_stream_container.battery_overlay: absolute top-4 right-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-zinc-700/50 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-mono flex items-center gap-2
video_stream_container.technical_corners: Absolute positioned brackets (L-shapes) in the 4 corners using thin borders to mimic camera UI

status_bento.description: Bento-style grids for Uptime and Connection Strength. Strict, dense 'Control Room' mode.
status_bento.card_classes: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800/60 rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3 relative overflow-hidden
status_bento.label: text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest text-zinc-500 uppercase
status_bento.value: text-xl font-mono text-zinc-100 flex items-center gap-2

alerts_section.description: List or stacked cards for Motion and Sound alerts.
alerts_section.card_classes: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800/50 rounded-2xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between

settings_panel.wrapper_classes: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800/60 rounded-[2rem] p-6 mx-6 mt-6 mb-8 flex flex-col gap-6
settings_panel.slider_thumb: w-5 h-5 bg-white rounded-full shadow-md border-2 border-zinc-900

google_login_screen.description: Minimalist landing page for login. Command-center vibe.
google_login_screen.wrapper_classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full px-8 text-center
google_login_screen.logo_classes: w-20 h-20 bg-zinc-900 rounded-[2rem] border border-zinc-800 mb-8 flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-2xl shadow-zinc-900/50
google_login_screen.button_classes: w-full bg-white text-zinc-950 font-bold rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-xl shadow-white/5 mt-12

animations.live_indicator: Use 'animate-pulse' on a small red circle next to the 'LIVE' text.
animations.page_transition: Framer Motion opacity and Y-axis translation (from y: 20, opacity: 0 to y: 0, opacity: 1).
animations.toggle_slide: Framer Motion layoutId='active-tab' for the sliding background behind the active camera pill.

icons_library: phosphor-react or lucide-react (Phosphor preferred for the technical/dense look. Suggest installing @phosphor-icons/react)

pelle_camera_placeholder.description: Sleeping dog representing the Pelle camera stream

printer_camera_placeholder.description: 3D printer printing representing the Printer camera stream

specific_instructions_to_main_agent: Install @phosphor-icons/react if using it, otherwise use lucide-react for the icons like Camera, Battery, WifiHigh, Timer, Activity, Sliders.

CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, sliders) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-btn', data-testid='camera-toggle-pelle', data-testid='motion-alert-toggle').
The application should feel like a native mobile app. Maintain a maximum width container (max-w-md) centered on the screen when viewed on desktop.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric stats, times, battery percentages, and technical labels.
Implement routing (or simple conditional state) to show the Google Login screen first, and upon clicking, navigate to the Dashboard.
For the camera settings (brightness/contrast), use standard input ranges or a custom Shadcn slider. Ensure they look tactile and fit the dark theme.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use the designated typography classes.
The video stream container should have absolute-positioned UI overlays on top of the image (LIVE indicator, Battery percentage).
